channel.title: Nixus on Elis Hirwing
channel.description: Recent content in Nixus on Elis Hirwing

item.title: Simple deployments of NixOS machines with nixus
item.description: Since I’ve started using NixOS about four years ago I haven’t really used any tools to do central deployments of machines. But I’ve always read and known that NixOS is excellent at this. NixOS can easily build another systems configuration, then copy the system to the target systems nix store and then activate it there. Despite knowing all this, I haven’t gotten around to doing this centrally. A while ago the need for this changed because one of my VPSes started running low on RAM, low enough to not be able to build new generations of it’s own system.
